title: Archive release evidence and delete execution plan

sources.reason: Contains the independently verified publication evidence that permits final plan cleanup.
Stores independently verified v0.5.32 publication evidence before plan deletion.
Generated archive index must remain consistent after the evidence update.

riskAssessment.reason: Deletion is narrowly authorized and limited to the completed plan; the main risk is deleting audit-relevant evidence, mitigated by preserving all archived pairs and release metadata.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly authorized this exact final deletion; scope and preservation rules are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm only the named plan is deleted and that all archived Work Item evidence and v0.5.32 release evidence remain discoverable.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The append-only publication evidence record stores v0.5.32, source commit 1c8f557db8740162ea01d7d820b4b618ff8a71e9, workflow 29620355096, published Release URL, tag target, and four release assets.
All ten Work Item archive pairs, archive index integrity, Cockpit status consistency, and release metadata remain valid.
The final PR contains no unrelated deletion and the lifecycle closes with a clean synchronized main branch.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The completed execution plan is no longer needed after all ten Work Items and the public release are complete, but its release evidence must remain auditable.
constraints: Preserve Contracts, Summaries, archive index, release metadata, and user-facing Trust documentation.
Record the published release evidence before deletion.
intent.rationale: Removing the finished plan prevents stale execution instructions while preserving the durable audit trail.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Only the named plan is deleted
Release evidence remains archived and discoverable
Final status and archive integrity remain valid

approvalEvidence.reason: User explicitly authorized deletion of the completed execution plan as the final Work Item.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly requested deletion of this exact completed execution plan as the final Work Item.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
